# Invalid Spec - Bad Task IDs

This spec has invalid task ID formats.

---

## Task-1: First task
Priority: P1
Files: src/a.ts (create)
Depends on: none
Acceptance: A is created

Wrong format - should be TASK-01

## TASK-A: Second task
Priority: P1
Files: src/b.ts (create)
Depends on: Task-1
Acceptance: B is created

Letters not allowed in task IDs
